emergency_definition: Sparking or burning smell from panel

emergency_routing_rules.after_hours_emergency: Attempt to reach Ben directly, leave urgent voicemail if no answer

non_emergency_routing_rules.during_hours: Take name and number, transfer to office or book callback
non_emergency_routing_rules.after_hours: Collect details, confirm follow-up next business day

call_transfer_rules.on_transfer_fail: Apologize and assure callback within 1 business hour

after_hours_flow_summary: Greet caller, confirm if emergency, if yes collect name/number/address and attempt transfer to Ben. If not emergency, collect details and confirm next-day callback.
office_hours_flow_summary: Greet caller, ask purpose, collect name and callback number, attempt transfer to available technician or office.
questions_or_unknowns: Business hours start and end times not confirmed
Fallback contact if Ben is unavailable not confirmed
Primary phone number for Ben not provided
notes: Ben expressed strong interest in automating after-hours calls. Currently missing calls overnight. Demo went well — he liked the emergency detection flow.
